text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While I'm waiting for<n><chrname> to show
up...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that looks really painful! What<n>happened to
your nail, Flash?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It got slightly chipped during gym<n>class. It's
nothing to fuss about.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I dunno, like, you should probably<n>take that more
seriously. Want me to<n>fix it up? I've got my kit
with me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There is no time for that. We have<n>less than three
minutes until our run.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And afterwards, we have a joint<n>dance lesson, so
I won't be able to<n>tend to my nails until that is
over.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? Why would you put it off<n>like that? It's
really gonna suck if that<n>nail gets worse.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Will you let me fix your<n>nails if I win
our race?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Very well... But then if I win, we shall<n>follow our
schedule to a tee.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Geez... Nails have power, you know!<n>Better not
take that power lightly!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The race between Tosen Jordan and<n>Eishin Flash
looks as if it'll go down<n>to the wire.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But when Eishin Flash squeezes her<n>fists in
preparation for the final<n>straight...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I-I win.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Flash! Didn't you say "ow"<n>right at the end
of the race?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: It appears that I squeezed my fist a<n>little too hard.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Seeeee? I told you that you gotta take<n>care of your
nails.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I should've listened. I will prioritize<n>maintaining
them.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm glad you got the message!<n>All right, I'll
have you fixed up in<n>juuust a sec!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: There. All done! Do you love it or<n>what?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I'm surprised. Not only do my nails<n>look better...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But it doesn't hurt at all when I<n>squeeze my fist.
Now I won't have to<n>hold back during my final
spurt.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Riiiiight? I'm, like, literally a pro.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you very much. By the<n>way, what
kind of tools do you—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, hey! No peeking! Gotta keep<n>my industry
secrets under wraps!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The nail supplies that Tosen Jordan is<n>trying to
hide come tumbling out.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: A manicure set for sports, I see.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Oh. Uh, well... Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I see. So your nails are not simply for<n>show.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
They're part of a secret strategy to<n>maximize
power, since victory is<n>determined by the smallest
of<n>margins.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I planned this or<n>anything... You're,
like, giving me too<n>much credit here...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No. I appreciate you revealing the<n>truth to me
through this experience.
choice_data_list: I guess they're both stylish and handy.
I think it's cool how serious you are about races.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, something like that. I don't<n>mind if you've
got some respect for<n>me now, y'know.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I will keep this in mind and repay you<n>one day.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes! I'm planning to bake some<n>Schneeballen
tomorrow. Please do<n>have some.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, for real? Those sound sochic. I'm totes down!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...It's all about being chic, okay?<n>Don't forget that.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. I'm, like, so tired! Time to go buy<n>some new
nail polish colors!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Both practical and gorgeous... I see. A<n>lesson well
learned.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, chill! It's not like I'm all passion<n>or whatevs,
you know? I just like to<n>do nails...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It smells... It stinks... It reeks... of<n>someone in the
THROES of youth!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh, what the... Where'd you come<n>from, Golshi?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, mon ami! Someone'sembarrassed! But who's the perp? Isit you?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ew, why are you acting like that?<n>That's low-key
annoying.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The suspect's on the run! Zut alors!<n>But the
shrewd detective Golshi the<n>Great is on the case!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Jordan appears to be troubled by<n>Golshi chasing
her...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Now is my chance to repay that debt!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Eishin Flash rescues Tosen Jordan,who comments that "what goesaround totes comes around."
